artPrompt: The frantic moment fleeing townsfolk silhouettes stream away from a sludge-flooded street in foreshortened panic while a single lone figure stands rooted facing the viewer, the monster's swelling green shadow rising at the far end. Rusted pipes and a crumbling plant loom under a bruised stormy sky, a blank smudged notice fluttering torn on a doorframe, kinetic exodus, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Town Evacuation Notice
text: Each player returns a creature they control to its owner's hand. You choose which of your creatures stays. (The monster's coming. Everyone clears out. You don't.)
flavorText: Posted on every door in Whateverville. Smelled faintly of the reservoir.
